llm_pddl.notes: LLM+P is PDDL-domain oriented. Provide a bridge.py in the cloned repo that maps EduPlanBench JSON requests to an EduPlanBench Action JSON response.

lats.notes: LATS has HotPotQA/programming/WebShop entrypoints. Provide a bridge.py that exposes the JSON bridge protocol for EduPlanBench observations.

plan_and_act.notes: Plan-and-Act is WebArena-oriented. Provide a bridge.py that calls its planner/executor and returns an EduPlanBench action.

reactree.notes: ReAcTree targets WAH/ALFRED and requires simulator setup. Provide a bridge.py that uses its tree controller over EduPlanBench observations.

hiagent.notes: HiAgent depends on AgentBoard. Provide a bridge.py that maps EduPlanBench requests to the HiAgent memory/controller and returns an action.
